# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 131.103 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 3.2894
  biquad b0=1.00045222705 b1=-1.99773403624 b2=0.99735535651 a1=-1.99773403624 a2=0.997807583558

  biquad b0=1.00295632461 b1=-1.98544409932 b2=0.982711284822 a1=-1.98544409932 a2=0.985667609429

  biquad b0=1.0161918637 b1=-1.90941987828 b2=0.905309275212 a1=-1.90941987828 a2=0.921501138916

  biquad b0=1.00135632809 b1=-1.99299604555 b2=0.992068134219 a1=-1.99299604555 a2=0.993424462306
